test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient for the scoped build-only change: tactical module rebuild passed, FTacticalGame.o is archived into libtactical.a, and TacticalTests passed (63/63).
documentation_accuracy_summary: No repository documentation update was warranted for this additive Makefile-only change, but documenter_result.json still carries a placeholder commit_hash value.

findings.summary: commit_hash remains PENDING_COMMIT_HASH instead of the actual documenter branch head commit
findings.impact: Machine-readable handoff metadata is inaccurate and reduces traceability for downstream consumers.
